channel.title: AISight — AI Capital Expenditure Tracker
channel.description: Latest news and data on AI infrastructure spending across 38 companies. Updated 3x daily from SEC filings and earnings calls.

item.title: OpenAI’s $122B “VC Round” Is Vendor Deals, Contingent Capital, and a Guaranteed Return It Arguably Can’t Afford
item.description: The three anchors are a cloud vendor, a chip vendor, and a holding company with a circular revenue deal. The actual VC-style capital is a fraction of the headline. OpenAI closed $122 billion at an $852 billion post-money valuation on March 31, 2026. But it’s … [OpenAI]

item.title: The $100B question: AI’s appetite for compute is rewriting the rules of tech
item.description: We’re hitting a pivotal moment in artificial intelligence right now. The latest financial disclosures from the front lines of the AI arms race — OpenAI Group PBC and Anthropic PBC — don’t just give us a peek under the hood; they expose the core tension shapin… [Intel, OpenAI, Anthropic, ServiceNow]

item.title: Resolight.ai launches to change the AI interconnect game
item.description: There’s a narrative forming in artificial intelligence infrastructure — and most people are still looking in the wrong place. Everyone’s focused on graphics processing units. More compute. Bigger clusters. Faster chips. That’s where the headlines are. But the… [Intel]

item.title: Three insights you might have missed from theCUBE’s coverage of KubeCon + CloudNativeCon EU
item.description: Modern infrastructure is being reshaped as artificial intelligence drives new levels of AI complexity across the stack. Kubernetes has moved into the center of AI-driven operations, but the shift is exposing a stubborn reality. Teams are still dealing with sk… [Intel, Uber]

item.title: Beware the Magical 2-Person, $1 Billion AI-Driven Startup
item.description: In early 2024, OpenAI CEO Sam Altman predicted there would be a “one-person billion dollar company, which would have been unimaginable without AI, but now it will happen.” Several media outlets recently concluded that the prediction came true (albeit with two… [OpenAI, ServiceNow]

item.title: Alphabet Stock Rises Modestly as Analysts Affirm GOOG as Long-Term Buy on AI and Cloud Strength
item.description: NEW YORK — Alphabet Inc. shares edged higher Monday, with Class C stock (GOOG) trading near $296.60 after gaining $2.14 or 0.73% in afternoon trading, as Wall Street largely reinforced its bullish long-term outlook despite heavy 2026 capital spending plans fo… [Alphabet]

item.title: Oracle hires new CFO on mammoth salary after ruthless worker bloodbath
item.description: The tech giant made the appointment amid rising debt from its extensive AI infrastructure investments. [Oracle]

item.title: Data Center Chip Market worth $687.65 billion by 2032 - Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
item.description: DELRAY BEACH, Fla., April 6, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- According to MarketsandMarkets™, the Data Center Chip Market is expected to reach USD 687.65 billion by 2032 from USD 283.16 billion in 2026, registering a CAGR of 15.9% during the forecast period. Browse 170 …
